title: Soul Skies
description: Horror Themed Minecraft Sky for optifine
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c76d1a97d8bc15bf952d264a2a55b2006da88fb.jpeg)

### About
SouldSkies v1 is a horror-themed sky overlay for Minecraft. Great for PvP, adventure maps, or adding a spooky atmosphere to your world.


### Perfomance
Uses a high-quality image for the sky. May cause slight FPS drops on lower-end PCs.


### Bugs
If you find any bugs, please report them in our Discord server (currently under maintenance).

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c952a5d53a7af1439b21e9a934efd0ef66cf42a4.png)
